title: Age amount – Personal income tax - Canada.ca
content:
## Age amount – Personal income tax
- Provincial or territorial: Line 58080
- Tax year: 2025 | Prior tax years: 2024 and earlier
You may be able to claim the age amount to reduce the amount of income tax you owe.
If you were bankrupt or moved to Canada or from Canada during the tax year, special rules apply for claiming this amount. To learn more, contact the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) .
- Who can claim the age amount
- How much you can claim Transferring the age amount
- Transferring the age amount

## Who can claim the age amount
Generally, you can claim the age amount if you meet all of the following conditions:
- You were 65 years of age or older on December 31, 2025
- Your net income ( line 23600 of your return) is less than $105,709

## How much you can claim
The amount you can claim depends on your net income (line 23600 of your return).

### Claim amount based on your net income
- Federal amount for 2025 If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $45,522 or less , claim $9,028 more than $45,522 but less than $105,709 , complete the chart for line 30100 on your Federal Worksheet to calculate your claim

### Federal amount for 2025
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $45,522 or less , claim $9,028
- more than $45,522 but less than $105,709 , complete the chart for line 30100 on your Federal Worksheet to calculate your claim
- Provincial and territorial amounts for 2025 The age amount you can claim may also vary depending on the province or territory where you lived at the end of the year : Alberta If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $46,308 or less , claim $6,221 more than $46,308 but less than $87,782 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet AB428 to calculate your claim British Columbia If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $43,169 or less , claim $5,799 more than $43,169 but less than $81,829 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet BC428 to calculate your claim Manitoba If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $27,749 or less , claim $3,728 more than $27,749 but less than $52,602 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet MB428 to calculate your claim New Brunswick If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $44,945 or less , claim $6,037 more than $44,945 but less than $85,192 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NB428 to calculate your claim Newfoundland and Labrador If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $38,712 or less , claim $7,064 more than $38,712 but less than $85,806 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NL428 to calculate your claim Northwest Territories If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $45,522 or less , claim $8,727 more than $45,522 but less than $103,702 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NT428 to calculate your claim Nova Scotia If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $30,828 or less , claim $5,734 more than $30,828 but less than $69,055 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NS428 to calculate your claim Nunavut If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $45,522 or less , claim $12,303 more than $45,522 but less than $127,542 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NU428 to calculate your claim Ontario If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $46,330 or less , claim $6,223 more than $46,330 but less than $87,817 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet ON428 to calculate your claim Prince Edward Island If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $36,600 or less , claim $6,510 more than $36,600 but less than $80,000 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet PE428 to calculate your claim Quebec Refer to: Revenu Québec Saskatchewan If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was: $43,066 or less , claim $5,785 more than $43,066 but less than $81,633 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet SK428 to calculate your claim Yukon Claim the amount from line 30100 of your federal tax return.

### Provincial and territorial amounts for 2025
The age amount you can claim may also vary depending on the province or territory where you lived at the end of the year :
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $46,308 or less , claim $6,221
- more than $46,308 but less than $87,782 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet AB428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $43,169 or less , claim $5,799
- more than $43,169 but less than $81,829 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet BC428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $27,749 or less , claim $3,728
- more than $27,749 but less than $52,602 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet MB428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $44,945 or less , claim $6,037
- more than $44,945 but less than $85,192 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NB428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $38,712 or less , claim $7,064
- more than $38,712 but less than $85,806 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NL428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $45,522 or less , claim $8,727
- more than $45,522 but less than $103,702 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NT428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $30,828 or less , claim $5,734
- more than $30,828 but less than $69,055 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NS428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $45,522 or less , claim $12,303
- more than $45,522 but less than $127,542 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet NU428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $46,330 or less , claim $6,223
- more than $46,330 but less than $87,817 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet ON428 to calculate your claim
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $36,600 or less , claim $6,510
- more than $36,600 but less than $80,000 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet PE428 to calculate your claim
Refer to: Revenu Québec
If your net income (line 23600 of you return) was:
- $43,066 or less , claim $5,785
- more than $43,066 but less than $81,633 , complete the chart for line 58080 on Worksheet SK428 to calculate your claim
Claim the amount from line 30100 of your federal tax return.

### Transferring the age amount
You may be able to transfer all or part of your age amount to your spouse or common-law partner. You may also be able to claim all or part of their age amount. For more information, see Line 32600 – Amounts transferred from your spouse or common-law partner .

### Claim the age amount on your federal tax return and Form 428
You can claim the age amount if you meet the conditions and your net income is below the threshold .
- Federal tax return On line 30100 of your federal tax return, enter the federal age amount that you determined under How much you can claim .
On line 30100 of your federal tax return, enter the federal age amount that you determined under How much you can claim .
- Provincial or territorial Form 428 On line 58080 of your provincial or territorial Form 428 , enter the provincial or territorial age amount that you determined under How much you can claim .

#### Provincial or territorial Form 428
On line 58080 of your provincial or territorial Form 428 , enter the provincial or territorial age amount that you determined under How much you can claim .
